title: Darker dark mode
description: Makes all of the UI in dark mode
body:
After hours of editing and udjusting of the textures, I hope you like it and play with it or show it, or at least follow me.

This ResourcePack changes the whole UI from the bright texture in the DARK MODE! to comfort your eyes and play while you calm

![Small Show Case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b054aa51fafa20c8d46d260d5dfec3124b48d6a_0.webp)
